subject: [SEV-1] api.prod returning 500s on /payments
body: PagerDuty fired at 03:12 UTC. /payments on api.prod is 100% 500. Database connection pool appears saturated. On-call escalation chain: @alex, @priya, @ops-lead. Runbook: docs.internal/runbooks/payments-db. This is customer-facing and losing revenue right now. Please ack in #incident-247 within 5 minutes.
